titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of BL Cotton Ch. xviii.15

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=668 status=live modified=2021-04-05 08:41:40.572986+00 | translation moa=669 status=live modified=2021-04-05 08:41:38.776452+00

p.cl: Willelmus dei gratia Rex scottorum . Episcopis . Abbatibus . Comitibus . Baronibus . Iusticiis . Ministris . et Omnibus probis hominibus totius terre sue . Clericis et laicis salutem .

me dedisse
et hac mea carta confirmasse deo et sancte Marie . et ecclesie de MailR’ . et Monachis ibidem deo seruientibus . pro anima Reg dauid aui mei . et p[ro] anima henrici comitis patris
mei . et Matris mee . et pro anima Malcolmi regis . et pro salute mea . et omnium antecessorum et successorum meorum . illam partem terre de lemeslei . quam Rex dauid concesserat
forestariis suis . et Ego postea Willelmo filio Oein concesseram . Scilicet illum toftum et Masagium quod predictus Willelmus tenuit et possedit . Vt edificent illud . sicut eis
utilius uisum fuerit pro libitu suo . Et liceat eis arare et colere totam terram illam tantum . que ante fracta fuerat et arata . cum omnibus libertatibus foreste inter Galeghe
et Ledre . sicut continetur in cartis Antecessorum meorum . et meis . Hanc ergo terram concedo eis . et presenti carta confirmo in perpetuam Elemosinam . Vt eam habeant . et possi
deant predicti Monachi . Libere et quiete . plenarie et honorifice . sicut aliqua Elemosina quietius et liberius teneri potest . Solutam ab omni terreno seruicio . et seculari
exaccione . Ita quod Ego et heredes mei warantizabimus eis hanc terram . contra omnes homines .

His testibus . Osberto abbate de kelcho . Hugone abbate de Nevbotle
Willelmo malueisin . Ricardo de la prouende . Hugone . del seel . Dauid comite fratre Regis . Roberto de quinci . Hugone . ridel . Ricardo de munfichet . Philippo de
valuin . Rogero de valuin . Waldeuo filio baldewin . Alexandro de sent Martin . Herueio le mareschal . Ricardo de marescal . Roberto de seint
Michel . Alano filio Hugonis senescallo comitis . dauid . Ricardo filio Eissun . Adam de stanford .
William, by the grace of God king of the Scots, to bishops, abbots, earls, barons, justices, officials, and all worthy men of his entire land, clerk and lay, greeting.

to have given, and by this my charter to have made firm, to God, St Mary, the church of Melrose, and the monks serving God in that place, for the soul of King David my grandfather, and for the soul of Earl Henry my father, and of my mother, and for the soul of King Malcolm, and for my own salvation, and of all my predecessors' and successors' [salvation], that piece of land at Blainslie which King David conceded to his foresters, and I afterwards had conceded to William son of Oein, that is to say, the toft and messuage that the aforesaid William held and possessed, so that they may build it just as it shall seem most beneficial to them at their own will. And it is permitted to them to plough and cultivate that entire land only which had beforehand been broken and ploughed, with all the liberties of the forest between Gala and Leader, as it is specified in the charters of my predecessors, and my own. This land I therefore concede to them, and by the present charter make firm in everlasting alms, so that the aforesaid monks may have and possess it freely and quitly, fully and honourably, just as any alms can most quitly and freely be held, released from every earthly service and secular exaction, so that I and my heirs shall warrant this land to them against all men.

With these witnesses: Osbert abbot of Kelso; Hugh abbot of Newbattle; William Malveisin; Richard de Prebenda; Hugh de Sigillo; Earl David, the king's brother; Robert de Quincy; Hugh Ridel; Richard de Munfichet; Philip de Valognes; Roger de Valognes; Waldef son of Baldwin; Alexander de Saint-Martin; Hervey the marischal; Richard [the] marischal; Robert de Saint-Michel; Alan son of Hugh, Earl David's steward; Richard son of Eissun; Adam of Standford.
